name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-73
title: policy-header.json header text references /rabbit-feature-touch as 'one-time or session override' (terminology drift)
description: policy-header.json line 2: 'skip it only for trivial edits via the one-time or session override.' This is reasonable but the override usage was deliberately restricted to human-approved bypasses (spec.md scope-override section); presenting overrides as a general 'skip TDD' switch contradicts the 'reserved for exceptional human-approved bypasses, not routine workflow writes' language at spec.md L286. The CLAUDE.md header is the most-imported policy banner — its phrasing influences every session. Soften the wording to reflect that overrides require human approval and are not a general TDD-skip mechanism.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup: bug invalid — see triage notes in tdd-report-rabbit-cage.json
